overall.description: First-person footage of a person walking through a dark forest trail at night using a flashlight. The camera moves steadily along a narrow path surrounded by dense trees, transitioning from a dirt trail to rockier uphill terrain as the clip progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight held at chest level

entered.detail: tall tree trunks lining the left side of the narrow trail
tall tree trunks lining the right side of the narrow trail
narrow dirt trail covered with fallen leaves winding through the forest
low vegetation and shrubs at the base of trees on the left
low vegetation and shrubs at the base of trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dense forest trail at night. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path covered with fallen leaves, flanked by tall trees and thick underbrush on both sides. The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed natural corridor with no other visible agents or structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders and uphill slope

events.description: artificial light source becomes visible on the left side, suggesting proximity to a road or building
terrain transitions from flat dirt path to rocky uphill trail with large boulders

agents.ego_description: walking uphill over rocky terrain, carefully navigating around large stones and boulders on the path

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks scattered across the trail creating an uneven walking surface
bright white light visible through the trees on the left, likely from a street lamp or building

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes rockier and slopes upward as the person continues walking. Large boulders appear on the path requiring careful navigation. Around the midpoint of this segment, an artificial light source becomes visible through the trees on the left side, indicating the trail is approaching a developed area or road. The dense tree cover remains but the ground surface is now dominated by rocks and stones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from a soft dirt trail into a rugged, rocky ascent. It begins with a steady forward movement along a narrow path covered in fallen leaves, enclosed by tall trees and thick underbrush. As the camera progresses, the terrain shifts from soil to a steeper slope dominated by large boulders and stones that require careful navigation. The scene then opens slightly as an artificial light source emerges through the trees on the left, signaling an approach toward a developed area. This glow pierces the darkness of the dense forest before the camera continues its climb upward through the rocky landscape.
